kw.name: Return From Keyword If
kw.doc: Returns from the enclosing user keyword if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Run And Return Rc And Output
kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the RC and output.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.msg: Returning from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Pass Execution If
kw.doc: Conditionally skips rest of the current test, setup, or teardown with PASS status.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Run And Return Rc And Output
kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the RC and output.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.msg: Returning from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Run And Return Rc And Output
kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the RC and output.

kw.name: Run And Return Rc And Output

kw.msg: Running command 'ozone freon omkg -t 10 -n 100 -v vol1 -b bucket1 2>&1'.

kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Check current leader is different than OM
Execute
kw.arg: ozone admin om roles -id=omservice | grep 'LEADER' | awk -F ':' '{ print $1 }'

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Run And Return Rc And Output
kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the RC and output.
kw.msg: Running command 'ozone admin om roles -id=omservice | grep 'LEADER' | awk -F ':' '{ print $1 }' 2>&1'.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.msg: Returning from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Should Not Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` contains ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error

kw.name: Run snap diff and validate results
Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Run snap diff and get response
Execute
Run Keyword And Return
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Run And Return Rc And Output
kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the RC and output.
kw.msg: Running command 'ozone sh snapshot diff /vol1/bucket1 snap1 snap2 2>&1'.
${output} = Snapshot diff job is IN_PROGRESS. Please retry after 60000 ms.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
kw.msg: Snapshot diff job is IN_PROGRESS. Please retry after 60000 ms.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.msg: Returning from the enclosing user keyword.
${diff_res} = Snapshot diff job is IN_PROGRESS. Please retry after 60000 ms.
${diff_res} = Snapshot diff job is IN_PROGRESS. Please retry after 60000 ms.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.
kw.msg: 'Snapshot diff job is IN_PROGRESS. Please retry after 60000 ms. ' does not contain 'Difference between snapshot: snap1 and snapshot: snap2'

kw.name: Run snap diff and get response
Execute
Run Keyword And Return

kw.name: Run And Return Rc And Output

kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
kw.msg: Difference between snapshot: snap1 and snapshot: snap2 + ./sn + ./sn/key1 + ./sn/key2

kw.name: Check current leader is different than OM

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.msg: Returning from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Run And Return Rc And Output
kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the RC and output.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.msg: Returning from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Run snap diff and validate results
Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Run snap diff and get response
Execute
Run Keyword And Return
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Run And Return Rc And Output
kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the RC and output.
kw.msg: Running command 'ozone sh snapshot diff /vol1/bucket1 snap1 snap2 2>&1'.
${output} = Difference between snapshot: snap1 and snapshot: snap2 + ./sn + ./sn/key1 + ./sn/key2

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
kw.msg: Difference between snapshot: snap1 and snapshot: snap2 + ./sn + ./sn/key1 + ./sn/key2

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.msg: Returning from the enclosing user keyword.
${diff_res} = Difference between snapshot: snap1 and snapshot: snap2 + ./sn + ./sn/key1 + ./sn/key2
${diff_res} = Difference between snapshot: snap1 and snapshot: snap2 + ./sn + ./sn/key1 + ./sn/key2

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Run snap diff and get response
Execute
Run Keyword And Return
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Run And Return Rc And Output
kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the RC and output.
kw.msg: Running command 'ozone sh snapshot diff /vol1/bucket1 snap1 snap2 2>&1'.
${output} = Difference between snapshot: snap1 and snapshot: snap2 + ./sn + ./sn/key1 + ./sn/key2

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
kw.msg: Difference between snapshot: snap1 and snapshot: snap2 + ./sn + ./sn/key1 + ./sn/key2

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.msg: Returning from the enclosing user keyword.
${diff_res} = Difference between snapshot: snap1 and snapshot: snap2 + ./sn + ./sn/key1 + ./sn/key2
${diff_res} = Difference between snapshot: snap1 and snapshot: snap2 + ./sn + ./sn/key1 + ./sn/key2

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Run And Return Rc And Output
kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the RC and output.
kw.msg: Running command 'echo "Difference between snapshot: snap1 and snapshot: snap2 + ./sn + ./sn/key1 + ./sn/key2 " | grep 'key' | wc -l 2>&1'.

kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.msg: Returning from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the RC and output.
kw.msg: Running command 'echo "Difference between snapshot: snap1 and snapshot: snap2 + ./sn + ./sn/key1 + ./sn/key2 " | grep key1 | wc -l 2>&1'.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers

kw.msg: Returning from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Should Be True

test.name: Cat snapshot keys and validate contents

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Return From Keyword If
kw.doc: Returns from the enclosing user keyword if ``condition`` is true.
kw.msg: Returning from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Pass Execution If
kw.doc: Conditionally skips rest of the current test, setup, or teardown with PASS status.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Run And Return Rc And Output
kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the RC and output.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.msg: Returning from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns from the enclosing user keyword.

kw.name: Run And Return Rc And Output
kw.doc: Runs the given command in the system and returns the RC and output.

suite.doc: Smoke test for validating snapshot data after om bootstrap.
